# Vendored scansci-pdf Wheel

This directory contains the fixed `scansci-pdf` wheel used by `njtech-paper` bootstrap so new users do not need to download the patched source archive from GitHub during setup.

- Source commit: `8963533f5eb84b6cdd99f89ec94916ed0ca9acbc`
- Source branch: `fffaang/njtech-paper`, branch `scansci-pdf-elsevier-fix`
- Source change: Elsevier CARSI institution selection and cookie banner handling
- Wheel: `scansci_pdf-1.5.0-py3-none-any.whl`
- SHA256: `fdcdc8030ce4b6f6c3e3963e0b6527f6d0ffad049eef6c3cc98610e07b462c5d`

The wheel contains code only. It must not contain accounts, passwords, cookies, tokens, browser profiles, storage state, downloaded PDFs, signed asset URLs, or other private access artifacts.
